## Scope check

- [ ] This change contains no credentials, private customer data, generated artifacts, private operational docs, or client-specific material.
- [ ] This change does not add paid AI Studio logic, proprietary domain packs, feedback learning loops, eval pipelines, multi-tenant governance, MFA/RBAC, billing, or managed-service code.
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests or a clear manual validation note.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
